loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy and reactive energy for the month; per-phase breakdown, SEC, and subsidy targets are not measured or configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power trends over the last 7 days; rated and contracted power reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power as both input and output proxy — per-phase or separate HV/LV rails are not measured for this asset; loss and efficiency are derived from total active power.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — anomaly events, expected load, and thresholds are not measured by this asset.
